problem: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared?
hypothesis: If Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells is applied to they, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
